metadata.title: Contact
metadata.description: Get in touch with the Property Dreamz team. Reach verified buyers, request a callback, or start your property search in Mexico today.
metadata.ogDescription: Talk to our bilingual team about buying or listing real estate in Mexico.

hero.heading: We're here to help you make the <hl>right move.</hl>
hero.subtitle: Whether you're a buyer, developer, or real estate professional, our team is ready to provide the support and information you need.
hero.badgeBody: Real people, real answers. Here for you every step of the way.

liveChat.title: Live chat
liveChat.detail: Chat with Dreamzy or our team now.

whyContactUs.heading: We're committed to your success in Mexico.

expertGuidance.title: Expert guidance
expertGuidance.body: Our team knows the market and is here to answer your questions.

trustedSupport.title: Trusted support
trustedSupport.body: Get clear, honest, and up-to-date information you can rely on.

fastResponse.title: Fast response
fastResponse.body: We respond quickly so you can keep moving forward.

bilingualTeam.title: Bilingual team
bilingualTeam.body: Fluent in English and Spanish to serve you better.

quickForm.heading: Tell us how we can help you.
quickForm.successBody: Our team will get back to you shortly.
quickForm.privacyNote: Your information is secured and will never be shared

closingCta.heading: Let's turn your dream into a plan.
closingCta.body: Contact our team today and take the first step toward your future in Mexico.

leadForm.heading: Get in touch
leadForm.messagePlaceholder: Tell us more about what you're looking for...
leadForm.successBody: We'll be in touch within 24 hours.
